query:
-- Campeonatos com detalhes
SELECT id, name, apiFootballLeagueId, apiFootballSeason, isAvailable, status, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE tournamentId = tournaments.id) AS totalGames,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE tournamentId = tournaments.id AND status = 'finished') AS finishedGames,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE tournamentId = tournaments.id AND matchDate > NOW()) AS futureGames
FROM tournaments ORDER BY id;
